[{"href":"/tours/Da-Nang/Ba-Na-Hills-Golden-Hands-Bridge-Cable-Car-Rides-PRIVATE-TOUR/d4680-52502P29","text":"Best Seller
Experience an exhilarating private tour accompanied by a knowledgeable tour guide and a local driver. Departing from your hotel in either Hoi An or Da Nang, we will embark on a captivating car journey through the breathtaking Da Nang mountains and valleys. During the 5 km or 3.1-mile cable car ride, immerse yourself in the mesmerizing views of the lush jungle below and marvel at the stunning beauty of Da Nang's surroundings. Once we disembark from the cable car, be prepared to explore the renowned Golden Hands Bridge. Next, we will ascend to Ba Na Peak, situated at an impressive altitude of 1500 meters (4900 ft) above sea level, by taking the second cable car. At the peak, indulge in the Lunar Castle and Eclipse Square experiences. After our time at Ba Na, we will descend via the cable car and return to the foot of Ba Na. From there, we will drive back to Da Nang, making a stop to capture some memorable photos at the iconic Dragon Bridge and Love Bridge along the way.

Ride with a local guide, and enjoy photo breaks at Linh Ung Pagoda, Tam Giang Lagoon, Mo Waterfall, Lang Co Beach, the Marble Mountains, the abandoned water park, and the Hai Van Pass. Along the way, refuel with stops for local food and drinks (own expense).

Take a trip on the longest non-stop single track cable car in the world and once at the top, take in views of Golden Hand Bridge. Wander through French Village—a charming replica of a medieval French town—then visit Linh Ung Pagoda, a sacred Buddhist temple. There's plenty of free time to explore at your own pace, and your local guide is happy to help with tips and recommendations. An included buffet lunch of traditional Vietnamese food will keep you well-fueled during afternoon activities.

From Da Nang, take a trip through the scenic Hai Van Pass on a local train and enjoy views of the coastline, including a brief stop at the pristine white sand beach and crystal-clear waters of Lang Co Beach. Once arrived at Hue Imperial City (a UNESCO World Heritage Site), learn about its unique architecture—the result of a mixture of different cultures—and hear fascinating historical tales. At lunch, satisfy your tastebuds with delicious local food (including vegetarian options). There's plenty of time for photo ops, including Emperor Khai Dinh's tomb, Thien Mu Pagoda, and Perfume River.

There are two transfer options available: one-way or round-trip. Please carefully check your selected option before completing the booking to ensure it matches your travel needs. Option one-way transfer only: The driver will complete the journey at the designated drop-off point and will not wait or provide return service unless a separate booking is made. Option 2 ways -round-trip services, the driver will wait for guests during their visit to Ba Na Hills and return them to Da Nang at the agreed-upon time. Waiting time should be confirmed in advance. Contact our hotline via Whatsapp to confirm your booking please.
